text:
cc: note: diagnostic msg: PLEASE submit a bug report to http://llvm.org/bugs/
and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.

i386 (32 bit) kernel is at /usr/src/sys/i386/conf/
ee /usr/src/sys/i386/conf/
added this:
options DEVICE_POLLING
options HZ=2000

after this commant :

make buildkernel KERNCONF=GENERIC

FATAL ERROR HAPPENED

Fix: 

I dont know , may be i did somthing wrong, but i dont think i fallowed
the instruction about hot to rebuild the kernel with enabled DEVICE POLLING

Instructions are here:
http://www.cyberciti.biz/faq/freebsd-device-polling-network-polling-tutorial/
How-To-Repeat: suddenly happened, i even didnt know that it will happen, sorry
